class BatchProcessor:
    def __init__(self):
        self.results = []

    def process_batch(self, items):
        results = []
        for item in items:
            results.append(transform(item))
        self.send_results(results)
        del results

    def send_results(self, data):
        pass

def transform(item):
    return item["value"] * 2

def process_events():
    entries = []
    for event in get_events():
        entries.append(event)
    persist(entries)
